headline: Here Are Tuesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Ameriprise Financial, Arista Networks, Arm Holdings, Lennar, Morgan Stanley, Rocket Lab, Tractor Supply, Wingstop, Wix.com and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading lower on Tuesday morning after investors returned from the three-day Easter weekend to find a stock market ready to rally after some promising news on the war in Iran and a sense, among some across the financial world, that the market had put in a new bottom. Ed Yardeni, ... Here Are Tuesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Ameriprise Financial, Arista Networks, Arm Holdings, Lennar, Morgan Stanley, Rocket Lab, Tractor Supply, Wingstop, Wix.
